topic: The Amazon delivery driver for my route has been the same man for eleven years and he has not aged
title: The Amazon Driver on My Route Has Not Aged in Eleven Years | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The Amazon driver on my route has been the same man for eleven years. He has not aged.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a blue Amazon delivery van parked at the curb of a quiet suburban street in afternoon light, a delivery man seen from behind walking up a driveway carrying a package, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Quiet street in suburban Maryland. Same brown house. Same porch.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a two story brown brick suburban home in late afternoon light, a covered front porch with two wicker chairs, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of three brown Amazon boxes stacked on a welcome mat at a front door, evening porch light overhead, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed on a side by side photo my wife took for fun.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a phone screen showing two photographs of an Amazon driver in uniform standing on a porch years apart, the man appearing identical, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a delivery man's gloved hand resting on a doorframe, only the hand and the blue cuff of the uniform visible, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked my neighbor. She had photos going back further.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a kitchen table covered in printed photographs of an Amazon driver at various front porches over a decade, all from behind or in profile, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a single old printed photograph showing a delivery van and a uniformed man from the back walking up a sidewalk, the print dated twenty fourteen in the corner, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a metal lunchbox sitting on the dashboard of an Amazon delivery van, the blue uniform shirt sleeve resting beside it, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled the delivery history on every Amazon account in the house.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a laptop screen showing a long delivery history log with one repeating driver ID highlighted in yellow across years of entries, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: His employee badge was issued in nineteen ninety three. Before Amazon Logistics existed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laminated employee badge clipped to a blue uniform pocket showing a faded issue date of nineteen ninety three, the photo on the badge obscured in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I waved at him last Tuesday.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a delivery man standing at the foot of a residential driveway looking toward the camera, his face in shadow under a blue cap, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He waved back. He knew my name.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a gloved hand raised in a half wave beside a blue Amazon van door, the figure beyond out of focus in fog, vertical 9:16 framing
